_source: RESEARCH 'Strict 12x1L Matcher' verbatim live string '12 x 1-l case ... (Fanta/Sprite/Mezzo Mix), 9,99 €' (marktguru.de/bl/coca-cola/koeln). Mixed-brand phrasing ('oder Fanta/Sprite/Mezzo Mix') is corroborated by captured results[1] 'MEZZO MIX oder FANTA'. A 12x1L case that bundles sibling brands is ambiguous -> needsReview (D-08), not silently accepted.
description: Coca-Cola oder Fanta/Sprite/Mezzo Mix 12 x 1-l case versch. Sorten zzgl. 3,30 Pfand 9,99 €
